hooks.command: node -e "let d='';process.stdin.on('data',c=>d+=c);process.stdin.on('end',()=>{const o=JSON.parse(d);const p=(o.tool_input||{}).file_path||(o.tool_input||{}).command||'';if(p.includes('.protected_files_for_test_hook')){process.stdout.write(JSON.stringify({hookSpecificOutput:{hookEventName:'PreToolUse',permissionDecision:'deny',permissionDecisionReason:'Access to .protected_files_for_test_hook folder is blocked'}}));process.exit(2);}});"
